## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss delivery org updates, client feedback, and Atlas workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Delivery org shifting focus to goal-setting, reporting, and strategic direction for clients](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [New standardized processes being implemented for artifacts, reporting, and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Atlas workflow optimization requires focus on inputs/outputs, especially brief and outline stages](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Team encouraged to run batches of articles and speak up about workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Topics

### Client Feedback and Delivery Org Changes

  - [Positive feedback on partnership, trust, and communication](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [Goal setting and reporting (metrics tied to higher-level goals)](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Consistent delivery of promised SEO workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Strategic direction and industry insights](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Changes being implemented:](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Resetting all client artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [Standardizing reporting and Airtable usage](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Regular pod stand-ups and weekly activity summaries](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Hiring in-house publisher and offering more resources](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### Atlas Workflow Optimization

  - [Four core artifacts: audience personas, company context, writing guidelines, CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Key pipeline steps: assignment brief, researcher, outline, draft, fact check](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Time allocation guidance:](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [50-60% on polishing brief](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
      - [25-30% on outline](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
      - [10-15% on draft passes](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Common pitfalls to avoid:](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [Using generic keywords instead of specific phrases](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Waiting to fix voice issues instead of updating writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [Cutting paragraphs late instead of pruning outline](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Workflow Customization and Client Management

  - [Custom pipelines can be created for specific client needs (e.g. PSEO workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
  - [Team encouraged to renegotiate client relationships to remove bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Engineering support available for highly specific formatting requirements](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to transition to new Airtable template for all clients](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Directors to set up regular pod stand-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Team to start submitting weekly activity summaries (starting Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Members to speak up about workflow issues to improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Specific formatting requests to be submitted as tickets with detailed schemas](https://fathom.video/share/ty8gyhNs2czCztTa34xNkus1CxntrPhV?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
